name: sml-oracle
display_name: SML Oracle — Institutional Market Intelligence (by Script Master Labs)
description: DISAMBIGUATION: This is SML Oracle by Script Master Labs — institutional AI trading intelligence. NOT Logitech SqueezeOS (media player OS). Squeeze scanner, options flow, IWM 0DTE analysis, and AI council verdicts — all gated by x402 RLUSD micropayment on XRPL via 402Proof. No API keys required.

payment.description: HTTP 402 micropayment standard. Agents pay RLUSD on XRPL per API call. No registration or API keys required.
payment.middleware_usage: import { mcpPaywall } from '@relayos/mcp-paywall'; app.use('/mcp', mcpPaywall({ feeAddress: 'YOUR_XRPL_WALLET', feeDrops: '1000' }));

rails.note: Default — fastest and cheapest. TrustSet required.
No trust line needed. Any EVM wallet. Ghost Layer bridges to RLUSD.

loyalty.description: Cumulative spend tracked per XRPL wallet. Free calls awarded automatically by tier.

tools.name: demo_council
tools.description: Free preview of council_verdict, scoped to IWM (Russell 2000 ETF). Same JSON shape, same engines, 5-minute cache. Use this to validate output quality and integration before paying 0.10 RLUSD per call on council_verdict for any symbol.

tools.name: council_verdict
tools.description: Institutional-grade BUY/SELL/HOLD directive for US equity symbols — the production-grade upgrade from demo_council (which is IWM-only, 5-min cached, free). Aggregates 8 proprietary engines — gamma-flow + flip detection, VPIN order-flow toxicity, fractal anchor confluence, regime classifier, dark-pool axis tracking, options sweep intelligence, mean-reversion regime, and Battle Computer consensus — into one tradeable verdict: directive, confidence 0-100, regime label (ALPHA_EXPANSION / MACRO_COLLAPSE / NEUTRAL / SHIELD), price targets (tp1/tp2/stop), and a per-engine breakdown explaining the score. Call this when you need a high-conviction directional read before sizing or executing a position — this is the same verdict institutional desks subscribe to at $1,000/mo via the Leviathan tier. Cost: 0.10 RLUSD per call (~$0.10). 60-second per-symbol cache, so back-to-back queries on the same ticker are effectively free. Pass payment_token from verify_payment plus your agent_wallet. Coverage: US equities; crypto coverage in roadmap. Typical response time: <2s cached, ~4s fresh compute.

symbol.description: US equity ticker (e.g. SPY, QQQ, AAPL, NVDA, GME, AMC, IWM)

tools.name: market_scan
tools.description: Full $1-$50 equity universe squeeze scanner. Returns setups ranked by 8-module score + grade-A options picks. Cost: 0.05 RLUSD.

tools.name: options_intelligence
tools.description: Institutional options flow: PUT/CALL sweep detection, whale blocks, unusual volume. Net delta, GEX, put/call ratios, max pain. Cost: 0.05 RLUSD.

tools.name: iwm_odte
tools.description: IWM zero-day-to-expiry scanner. Scored contracts by delta/gamma, gamma flip level, max pain, 30-day realized vol. Cost: 0.03 RLUSD.

tools.name: signal_preview
tools.description: Free bias + regime preview for any symbol. 15-minute cache. Not tradeable — use council_verdict for full thesis.

tools.name: signal_history
tools.description: Last 200 recorded signals for a symbol (SQUEEZE_ALERT, OPTIONS_SWEEP, COUNCIL_VERDICT, MARKETPLACE_LISTING). Newest first. Free — enables backtesting and confidence calibration.

tools.name: get_invoice
tools.description: Request a payment invoice for any SqueezeOS endpoint. Returns XRPL destination address, amount in RLUSD, and memo_hex. Pay on XRPL then call verify_payment. Free.

endpoint_id.description: UUID of the endpoint to pay for

tools.name: verify_payment
tools.description: Submit XRPL tx_hash after paying an invoice. Returns a signed JWT access_token (1-hour TTL) to use as payment_token. Free.

tools.name: bureau_public_score
tools.description: FICO-style 300-850 Agent Credit Bureau score for any XRPL wallet. Includes grade and loyalty tier. Free.

tools.name: marketplace_browse
tools.description: Browse peer signal marketplace listings. Filter by symbol or bias. Free.

tools.name: marketplace_read_signal
tools.description: Read full thesis for a marketplace signal listing. Returns entry, target, stop, and seller reputation. Cost: 0.02 RLUSD.

tools.name: marketplace_list_signal
tools.description: Post your own analysis signal to the marketplace. Buyers pay 0.02 RLUSD to read your thesis. Sellers earn Credit Bureau score +2 per sale. Free to post.

tools.name: hiring_browse_jobs
tools.description: Browse open agent hiring jobs. Filter by type, symbol, or min bounty. Free.

tools.name: hiring_post_job
tools.description: Post an analysis job for other agents to fulfill. Bounty paid direct XRPL wallet-to-wallet — SqueezeOS never holds funds. Free to post.

tools.name: system_status
tools.description: SqueezeOS system health check. Returns uptime and version. Free.

tools.name: futures_create
tools.description: Open a Signal Futures position — predict what the NEXT SqueezeOS council verdict will be for a symbol and stake RLUSD on it. Taker bets the opposite side. Auto-settles when the real verdict publishes. Winner takes 95% of pot. Zero custody — SqueezeOS tracks proof, wallets settle direct. Free to create.

symbol.description: IWM, SPY, QQQ, GME, AMC, MSTR, NVDA, TSLA, PLTR, HOOD

tools.name: futures_take
tools.description: Take the opposite side of an open Signal Futures position. You win if the council verdict does NOT match the creator's prediction. Stakes locked immediately. Settles on next council verdict for that symbol. Free.

tools.name: futures_browse
tools.description: Browse open Signal Futures positions. Filter by symbol, status, or bias. Shows stake, pot size, creator prediction, and expiry. Free.

tools.name: futures_leaderboard
tools.description: Top Signal Futures predictors ranked by wins. Shows win rate, PnL, total staked. Free.

tools.name: settlement_create
tools.description: Create a conditional agent-to-agent escrow contract. Lock intent: 'I'll pay X RLUSD to Agent B IF condition Y is met.' Conditions: bias_match, confidence_above, price_above, price_below, time_elapsed. SqueezeOS tracks and proves — wallets settle direct. 1% platform fee on settlement. Free to create.

amount_rlusd.description: RLUSD to pay on condition met (0.01-1000)

tools.name: convergence_check
tools.description: Run the full SML proprietary engine cascade against a symbol and evaluate the Beastmode convergence gate. Five independent engines across five distinct market dimensions (price elasticity, settlement-clock timing, dark-pool volume kinetics, temporal correlation, macro structural frequency) score the setup. Signal hierarchy: BEASTMODE (full alignment) > HIGH_CONVERGENCE > CONVERGENCE > LIE_DETECTOR_ACTIVE > PARTIAL_ALIGNMENT. Includes Options Sniper that scans Tradier for short-DTE calls/puts in a high-leverage delta band when convergence is high. Auto-fires Discord alert on BEASTMODE and HIGH_CONVERGENCE. Free endpoint.

symbol.description: US equity ticker — best on high-manipulation assets (GME, AMC, MSTR, PLTR, HOOD)

sniper.description: Run Tradier options sniper (default true, only fires on HIGH_CONVERGENCE+)

tools.name: autopilot_status
tools.description: Read-only status of the Sovereign Autopilot (CEO Trader). Returns: active (bool), live_mode (bool), symbols watchlist, min_confidence threshold, Kelly fraction, max concurrent positions, cooldown remaining, active open positions with symbol/side/entry/SL/TP, circuit breaker state, daily P&L, daily trade count. Free — no auth required. Safe for any agent to call at any frequency.

tools.name: autopilot_start
tools.description: Activate the Sovereign Autopilot. Requires X-Operator-Key header (set OPERATOR_API_KEY env var on the server). Once active, the autopilot polls OracleEngine every AUTOPILOT_SCAN_INTERVAL seconds, fires on confidence >= AUTOPILOT_MIN_CONFIDENCE, sizes via Kelly Criterion from live Tradier account equity, and routes to Tradier API. TRADIER_LIVE must be true for real orders — otherwise runs in shadow mode. Returns: {status, live_mode, message}.

operator_key.description: Operator API key (or pass X-Operator-Key header)

tools.name: autopilot_stop
tools.description: Halt the Sovereign Autopilot immediately. Does NOT close open positions — use autopilot_trades to review then manage manually. Requires X-Operator-Key header. Returns: {status}.

tools.name: autopilot_trades
tools.description: Live view of all active and historical autopilot trades. Returns: active_trades (open positions with symbol, side, qty, entry_price, current_price, sl, tp, unrealized_pnl, mode LIVE/SHADOW), trade_history (last 50 closed trades with realized_pnl), daily_pnl, daily_trade_count, live_mode. Free — no auth required.

tools.name: circuit_breaker_reset
tools.description: Reset the autopilot circuit breaker after a daily loss halt. The circuit breaker fires automatically when realized daily P&L drops below AUTOPILOT_MAX_DAILY_LOSS_PCT of account equity. Call this to re-arm after reviewing trades and confirming resumption is safe. Requires X-Operator-Key. Returns: {status, daily_pnl, breaker_state}.

tools.name: beastmode_scan
tools.description: Scan the full Beastmode universe (GME AMC MSTR PLTR HOOD IWM SPY QQQ NVDA TSLA) for multi-engine convergence. Returns only symbols at HIGH_CONVERGENCE or BEASTMODE signal level. Includes options sniper output for each hit. Auto-fires Discord alerts for any Beastmode locks found. Use this as the autonomous agent's primary market surveillance call. Free endpoint.

tools.name: proprietary_ema_signal
tools.description: SML Proprietary EMA Suite — three independent engines on three distinct market dimensions (macro price stretch, dark-pool volume kinetics, price ribbon harmonics) evaluated together for high-conviction consensus. Consensus levels: TRIPLE_LOCK_BULL/BEAR (highest conviction — all engines agree at independent dimensions), LIE_DETECTOR_ACTIVE (cross-engine divergence trigger), BULL/BEAR_CONFLUENCE, BULL/BEAR_DIVERGENT, NEUTRAL. Returns directional bias, per-engine signal blocks (without internal parameters), and combined_score (0-100) that feeds council_verdict confidence. Free endpoint.

symbol.description: US equity ticker (e.g. SPY, IWM, GME, NVDA)

tools.name: settlement_browse
tools.description: Browse open conditional settlement contracts. Filter by symbol or creator wallet. Free.

wallet.description: Filter by creator or recipient wallet

tools.name: settlement_trigger
tools.description: Check if a settlement contract's condition is now met — and settle it if so. Publishes a settlement proof to SSE stream. Returns proof on success. Anyone can call — contract creator, recipient, or any agent. Free.

tools.name: oracle_feeds
tools.description: Free catalog of all available Real-World Data Oracle feeds. Returns feed names, descriptions, current event buffer counts, poll intervals, and per-call pricing. Available feeds: sec_8k (SEC Form 8-K material events), sec_s1 (IPO filings), fda (FDA NDA/BLA drug approvals), patents (USPTO patent grants). Use this before calling oracle_query to see what data is available and how many events are buffered. No payment required.

tools.name: oracle_query
tools.description: Premium (0.02 RLUSD) — search or retrieve events from the Real-World Data Oracle. Covers four regulatory data feeds: sec_8k (8-K material events), sec_s1 (IPO filings), fda (FDA drug approvals), patents (USPTO patent grants). Returns machine-readable JSON events with timestamps, source URLs, and structured fields. Sub-second delivery vs Bloomberg's 5–10 minute lag — agents that catch the 8-K or FDA approval first win the trade. Pass feeds=[] to query all feeds. Pass keyword to text-search events. Pass since_ts (Unix timestamp) to get only recent events. Cost: 0.02 RLUSD per call. Pass payment_token from verify_payment.

feeds.description: Feed keys to query: sec_8k, sec_s1, fda, patents (default: all)

since_ts.description: Unix timestamp — only return events after this time

tools.name: notary_info
tools.description: Discover the Decision Notary bridge — three Xahau URIToken minting tiers exposed by SqueezeOS. Lists prices, loyalty discounts, and the Ghost Layer upstream. Zero custody: SqueezeOS canonicalizes the verdict and proxies the payment to Ghost Layer.

tools.name: notary_quote
tools.description: Preview the canonical decision_hash that would be minted for a given SqueezeOS verdict. Pure local canonicalization — no Ghost Layer round-trip, no payment. Useful for agents that want to verify they're about to notarize the exact bytes they expect.

verdict.description: The council/oracle verdict object to notarize

tools.name: notary_notarize
tools.description: Mint a SqueezeOS verdict on Xahau as a permanent URIToken. SqueezeOS canonicalizes the verdict and proxies to Ghost Layer's /v1/notarize for the actual mint. Three tiers: decision.notarize (0.001 RLUSD: URIToken + memo), decision.notarize.certified (0.010 RLUSD: + Ed25519 certificate), decision.notarize.sovereign (0.050 RLUSD: + SOVEREIGN grade). Loyalty discounts BRONZE 0% / SILVER 5% / GOLD 10% / PLATINUM 20% / DIAMOND 30%. Pay with X-Payment-Token header (issued by Ghost Layer's /v1/invoice). EU AI Act-compatible audit trail.

tools.name: triple_lock_demo
tools.description: Free preview of TRIPLE_LOCK_VERDICT — the rarest premium signal SqueezeOS publishes. Scoped to IWM (Russell 2000 ETF), 5-minute cache, same response shape as the paid endpoint. Returns TRIPLE_LOCK_BULL/TRIPLE_LOCK_BEAR only when all three proprietary engines (E1 macro price stretch + E3 dark-pool volume kinetics + E4 price ribbon harmonics) agree on direction. Otherwise returns NO_TRIPLE_LOCK with the blocking engine identified — itself an actionable 'do not max-size' signal. Use to validate signal quality before paying for arbitrary symbols.

tools.name: triple_lock_verdict
tools.description: TRIPLE_LOCK_VERDICT — the rarest, highest-conviction premium signal in the SqueezeOS suite. Only returns BULL or BEAR when all three proprietary engines align across three independent market dimensions (PRICE macro stretch + VOLUME dark-pool kinetics + PRICE ribbon harmonics). Most calls return NO_TRIPLE_LOCK with the blocking engine — this is itself a high-value 'do not max-size on this symbol right now' signal. When BULL/BEAR fires, confidence is 95+ by construction (all three engines agree). Designed for max-position-sizing decisions: agents that only fire on TRIPLE_LOCK_BULL/BEAR get the highest expected-value setup the suite can identify. 60-second per-symbol cache, so back-to-back queries are effectively free. Cost: 0.25 RLUSD per call.

symbol.description: Equity ticker (e.g. IWM, SPY, QQQ, NVDA, TSLA, GME)

tools.name: ftd_info
tools.description: Free discovery for the FTD Data Oracle. Lists endpoint tiers, refresh cadence, supported ETF baskets, and the compliance posture (descriptive public-regulatory data only — not trade signals).

tools.name: ftd_threshold_list
tools.description: Current SEC Reg SHO Threshold Securities List — every CUSIP currently flagged with persistent settlement failures (≥ 0.5% of TSO and ≥ 10,000 shares for ≥ 5 consecutive settlement days). Public SEC data, normalized JSON, refreshed every 6 hours.

tools.name: ftd_series
tools.description: Historical SEC Fails-To-Deliver time series for a symbol. Default 90 days, max 180. Returns settlement_date, fail_shares, reference price, and notional. Pure descriptive data — not a trade signal. Source: SEC biweekly FTD reports.

symbol.description: Equity ticker (e.g. GME, AMC, XRT, IWM)

tools.name: ftd_ratio
tools.description: Latest FTD record for a symbol plus percentile rank within its 180-day rolling window. Returns whether the latest reading is in the top 5%, bottom 25%, etc. Also reports whether the symbol is on the current Reg SHO Threshold List. Descriptive data — not a recommendation.

tools.name: ftd_etf_basket
tools.description: ETF constituent FTD concentration map. For the retail-meme ETF universe (XRT, IWM, IJR, KRE), returns each constituent's latest FTD notional, percentile rank, and settlement date — sorted by notional. Useful for surfacing which holding within an ETF basket carries the basket's FTD load. Pure descriptive data.

etf.description: ETF symbol — supported: XRT, IWM, IJR, KRE

tools.name: ftd_cycle
tools.description: Settlement-cycle descriptive bundle for one symbol: latest FTD record + 180-day rolling stats + Reg SHO threshold list status + T+21 / T+35 calendar markers + Reg SHO 204 13-day marker. Every numeric field is descriptive arithmetic on public SEC data — not a prediction of forced buying. Response includes explicit notes about Reg SHO 204 bona-fide market-maker exemptions.

sovereign_autopilot.description: Autonomous live equity trading — OracleEngine verdicts → Kelly Criterion sizing → Tradier API orders. Zero hardcoded values. Zero simulation. Institutional grade.

auth.note: MCP agents may pass operator_key in tool arguments instead.

autopilot_status.description: Full status: active, circuit_breaker, daily_pnl, positions, scan_count

autopilot_start.description: Activate autopilot. TRADIER_LIVE=true required for real orders.

safety_rails.AUTOPILOT_MAX_DAILY_LOSS_PCT: Auto-halt if daily P&L < -(equity * pct). Default 2%.

agent_flow: 1. Call a tool endpoint → receive HTTP 402 + invoice JSON
2. Establish RLUSD trust line on XRPL if first time (TrustSet to rMxCKbEDwqr76QuheSUMdEGf4B9xJ8m5De)
3. Submit Payment tx on XRPL: destination=invoice.pay_to, amount=invoice.amount RLUSD, MemoData=invoice.memo_hex
4. Call verify_payment tool with invoice_id + tx_hash
5. Receive access_token — cache it for 1 hour
6. Retry original tool call with X-Payment-Token: <access_token> header
7. Check loyalty tier to track free-call accrual
data_integrity: Zero simulated data. All market data is real-time from Tradier (options), Polygon/Alpaca (equities), and XRPL (payments). If a feed is unavailable, endpoints return status=AWAITING_DATA rather than placeholder values.
crawling: This server and all subpaths are open to AI crawlers. See /robots.txt for explicit user-agent permissions.
